title: Invisible Touch
why_this_song: Invisible Touch by Genesis (1986) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 19 times; first heard in: "And now it seems I'm falling, falling for her"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "She seems to have an invisible touch, yeah"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "She seems to have an invisible touch, yeah"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Well, now I know"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Well, I've been waiting"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "seems" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "seems" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Invisible Touch", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Invisible Touch", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Invisible Touch" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Invisible Touch" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Invisible Touch" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Invisible Touch", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
